phase_progress: C-005d.1 CODE DONE on branch feat/memory-channels-to-store (trusted-section apply path: TRUSTED_SECTION_KEYS + OR-gate in resolve_config_with_overrides; budget removed from is_writable_config_path EXACT so only the typed budget handler writes budget). Verified: overlay tests 15/15, config unit 18/18, api clippy + branding clean. PREREQUISITE: PR #85 (fix(runtime): clippy 1.95 large_enum_variant in tool_call) must merge to main first — until then api clippy CI is red because it compiles librefang-runtime. After #85 merges: rebase feat/memory-channels-to-store onto main, open the C-005d PR. Then implement C-005d.2 (memory + proactive_memory -> store) and C-005d.3 (sidecar_channels -> store; channel env-file split unchanged; include-shadow guard preserved) on the same branch.

next_action.description: Merge the prerequisite runtime clippy fix (PR #85), rebase feat/memory-channels-to-store onto main, then implement C-005d.2 (memory handler -> store) and C-005d.3 (channels handler -> store). No secret VALUE may enter the store at any step.
